name: UI/UX Pro Max
summary: Bring UI/UX Pro Max into NextClaw with bundled local design datasets, Python-powered search, design-system generation, and explicit write boundaries.

summaryI18n.en: Bring UI/UX Pro Max into NextClaw with bundled local design datasets, Python-powered search, design-system generation, and explicit write boundaries.
summaryI18n.zh: 把 UI/UX Pro Max 以本地内置数据集和 Python 搜索运行时接入 NextClaw，提供设计系统生成、UI/UX 检索与明确的写入边界。

description: Use this skill when the user wants professional UI/UX guidance inside NextClaw. It adapts the upstream UI/UX Pro Max skill into a marketplace-ready package with bundled local assets, Python 3 readiness checks, design-system generation, domain and stack searches, UX review guidance, and explicit confirmation rules before persisting files.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when the user wants professional UI/UX guidance inside NextClaw. It adapts the upstream UI/UX Pro Max skill into a marketplace-ready package with bundled local assets, Python 3 readiness checks, design-system generation, domain and stack searches, UX review guidance, and explicit confirmation rules before persisting files.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当用户希望在 NextClaw 内获得专业 UI/UX 指导时使用此技能。它将上游 UI/UX Pro Max 改造成可上架的 marketplace 技能：内置本地数据与脚本、提供 Python 3 就绪检查、设计系统生成、领域/技术栈检索、UX 审查指导，以及在落盘前的显式确认规则。

author: NextClaw (adapted from NextLevelBuilder)
